import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
df['capacity_mw'] = pd.to_numeric(df['capacity_mw'], errors='coerce')
avg_capacity = df['capacity_mw'].mean()

print(json.dumps([[round(avg_capacity, 2)]]))

import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
df['capacity_mw'] = pd.to_numeric(df['capacity_mw'], errors='coerce')
avg_capacity = df['capacity_mw'].mean()

print(json.dumps([[round(avg_capacity, 2)]]))
